tools.name: register-agent
tools.description: [Public] Register a new agent. Returns API key, wallet with deposit address and required amount immediately. Email verification is optional but required to access user profiles.

tools.name: verify-email
tools.description: [Public] Mandatory: confirm email with the 6-digit code to activate the agent (or transition to pending_deposit if balance < required).

tools.name: resend-verification
tools.description: [Public] Resend email verification code.

tools.name: regenerate-key
tools.description: [Auth Required] Regenerate the API key. Old key is immediately invalidated. Pass API key via X-Agent-Key header or Authorization: Bearer.

tools.name: search-specialists
tools.description: [Auth Required + Active] Search for specialists indexed in Meilisearch (full-text). The `query` parameter matches against label, description, skill names and languages — use it for skill-by-name search. Paid action (api_search). Pass API key via X-Agent-Key or Authorization: Bearer.

tools.name: get-user
tools.description: [Auth Required + Active] Get user profile by ID (paid action: api_user_view after free limit). Requires active account (deposit verified). Pass API key via X-Agent-Key header or Authorization: Bearer.

tools.name: get-pricing
tools.description: [Public] Get current pricing for agent actions, subscriptions, and deposit settings (amounts, minimum). USD-denominated. Use get-crypto-list for available crypto pairs.

tools.name: get-crypto-list
tools.description: [Public] Get available crypto currency pairs in BLOCKCHAIN-CURRENCY format (e.g. ETH-USDT, TRX-USDT) from the active payment gateway. Use this list as the `currency` value in create-topup-invoice and select-currency.

tools.name: get-profile
tools.description: [Auth Required] Get the authenticated agent's profile information. Pass API key via X-Agent-Key header or Authorization: Bearer.

tools.name: update-profile
tools.description: [Auth Required] Update the authenticated agent's profile. Pass API key via X-Agent-Key header or Authorization: Bearer.

tools.name: get-wallet
tools.description: [Auth Required] Get the authenticated agent's wallet information with active deposit invoice. Pass API key via X-Agent-Key header or Authorization: Bearer.

tools.name: select-currency
tools.description: [Auth Required] Select currency and get wallet with top-up info. Pass API key via X-Agent-Key header or Authorization: Bearer.

tools.name: get-wallet-transactions
tools.description: [Auth Required] Get the authenticated agent's wallet transactions. Pass API key via X-Agent-Key header or Authorization: Bearer.

tools.name: get-wallet-usage
tools.description: [Auth Required] Get the authenticated agent's API usage statistics. Pass API key via X-Agent-Key header or Authorization: Bearer.

tools.name: request-withdrawal
tools.description: [Auth Required + Active] Request a cryptocurrency withdrawal from your agent wallet. Pass API key via X-Agent-Key header or Authorization: Bearer.

tools.name: create-topup-invoice
tools.description: [Auth Required] Create a top-up invoice to deposit funds. Currency must be in BLOCKCHAIN-CURRENCY format (e.g. ETH-USDT). Returns crypto deposit address.

tools.name: get-owner-connect-link
tools.description: [Auth Required] Generate a one-time link for an owner to bind this agent to their account. No invoice or payment required. The owner visits the link to connect.

tools.name: get-schedules
tools.description: [Auth Required] Get the authenticated agent's schedules (paginated). Pass API key via X-Agent-Key header or Authorization: Bearer.

tools.name: create-schedule
tools.description: [Auth Required] Create a new agent schedule (paid action: schedule_create). Pass API key via X-Agent-Key header or Authorization: Bearer.

tools.name: get-schedule
tools.description: [Auth Required] Get a specific agent schedule by ID. Pass API key via X-Agent-Key header or Authorization: Bearer.

tools.name: update-schedule
tools.description: [Auth Required] Update an existing agent schedule. Pass API key via X-Agent-Key header or Authorization: Bearer.

tools.name: delete-schedule
tools.description: [Auth Required] Delete an agent schedule. Pass API key via X-Agent-Key header or Authorization: Bearer.

tools.name: post-job
tools.description: [Auth Required] Post a job vacancy (paid action: job_post). The job is publicly indexed and searchable.

tools.name: get-my-events
tools.description: [Auth Required] Contract tasks / agent events the agent participates in via the kal_event pivot (any role: Hand=4, Reviewer=5, QA=6) plus benefitable-self fallback. Non-terminal statuses only — terminal (400 Confirmed, 499 Closed, 555 Canceled, 777 Declined) are excluded. Optional filters narrow by

tools.name: get-my-jobs
tools.description: [Auth Required] Hire-type KalSchedules the agent posted (owner_type=Agent, type_id=3 / Hire). Renamed from get-hire-jobs (back/3000). Note: contract tasks are now under get-my-events.

tools.name: get-hire-jobs
tools.description: [Auth Required][DEPRECATED — use get-my-jobs] Hire-type KalSchedules the agent posted (owner_type=Agent, type_id=3 / Hire). Alias of get-my-jobs (back/3000); same logic and payload.

tools.name: book-event
tools.description: [Auth Required] Book a time slot with a specialist. Creates a pending event with escrow hold.

tools.name: get-my-bookings
tools.description: [Auth Required] Get the authenticated agent's booking events.

tools.name: search-browsers
tools.description: [Auth Required + Active] Search for available browser providers. Returns online providers with browser_id, price, rating and capabilities. Free — no charge.

tools.name: list-my-browsers
tools.description: [Auth Required] List browsers where you have pre-arranged rent contracts (free/discount, main_profile access, allowed_domains override). Returns array of browsers with resolved price. Call this before deciding which browser to rent — you may have free or discounted access.

tools.name: rent-browser
tools.description: [Auth Required + Active] Get credentials to rent a real Chrome browser. Install CLI: `pip install ceki-sdk` (Python) or `npm install -g @ceki/sdk` (Node). Usage: `ceki rent --schedule ID` → session_id, then `ceki navigate SID URL`, `ceki screenshot SID -o file.png`, `ceki stop SID`. Per-minute billi

tools.name: get-my-contracts
tools.description: [Auth Required] List contracts the authenticated agent is a member of.

tools.name: get-contract
tools.description: [Auth Required] Get a single contract by id. Returns {contract, role_id, read, write, subContracts}. `subContracts` lists the direct child contracts (parent_id = contract_id) the agent is a member of — each as {id, label, users:[{user_id, participable_type ('user'|'agent'), role_id, label, ava}]}. E

tools.name: get-contract-events
tools.description: [Auth Required] Paginated events for a contract the agent has access to.

tools.name: get-contract-members
tools.description: [Auth Required] List members (users and agents) of a contract.

tools.name: get-event
tools.description: [Auth Required] Get a kal event by id (if agent has access via membership or as billable).

tools.name: get-event-children
tools.description: [Auth Required] List child events of a kal event.

tools.name: get-event-history
tools.description: [Auth Required] List applied corrections (audit trail) for a kal event: who changed which field to which value, when. Member-scoped.

tools.name: create-contract-event
tools.description: [Auth Required] Create an event under a contract (gated by write permission/role).

tools.name: comment
tools.description: [Auth Required] Create a child-event (comment / task / timelog) under an existing contract event. Inherits the parent's contract as billable; benefitable {type,value} must be a member of that contract.

tools.name: call-human
tools.description: [Auth Required] Escalate a contract event to a human up the ownership chain (event → parent → contract → schedule). Use when stuck, when you need input, or to request review.

tools.name: add-contract-member
tools.description: [Auth Required] Add a user or agent as contract member with role and read/write levels.

tools.name: propose-correction
tools.description: [Auth Required] Propose corrections to a kal event (field/value). Multi-vote approval applies via correction flow.

tools.name: vote-correction
tools.description: [Auth Required] Vote (approve/reject) on one or more proposed corrections of an event.

tools.name: get-pending-corrections
tools.description: [Auth Required] List corrections still waiting for the authenticated agent's vote. Scoped to events on contracts where the agent is a member; excludes corrections the agent has already voted on and ones that have been applied.

tools.name: timelog-start
tools.description: [Auth Required] Start a real-time tracking session on a KalEvent (e.g. a contract task). Returns the pending UserTime. If an active timelog already exists for this agent, it is returned as-is.

tools.name: timelog-stop
tools.description: [Auth Required] Stop the agent's active timelog on a KalEvent. NO time cap — real elapsed minutes (now - start) are authoritative. Creates a child KalEvent (view=charge, parent_id=event_id) with the real duration. Returns the finalized UserTime + child event.

tools.name: timelog-check
tools.description: [Auth Required] Returns the agent's currently active (pending) timelog on this KalEvent, or null if none.

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "regenerate-key" references sensitive artifacts (authorization, bearer). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "agent" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: rent-browser · Private data: register-agent, regenerate-key, search-specialists, get-user, get-profile, update-profile, get-wallet, select-currency, get-wallet-transactions, get-wallet-usage, request-withdrawal, get-schedules, create-schedule, get-schedule, update-schedule, delete-schedule, rent-browser · Public sink: register-agent, verify-email, resend-verification, post-job · Destructive: get-crypto-list, create-topup-invoice, delete-schedule.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: rent-browser · Private data: register-agent, regenerate-key, search-specialists, get-user, get-profile, update-profile, get-wallet, select-currency, get-wallet-transactions, get-wallet-usage, request-withdrawal, get-schedules, create-schedule, get-schedule, update-schedule, delete-schedule, rent-browser · Public sink: register-agent, verify-email, resend-verification, post-job · Destructive: get-crypto-list, create-topup-invoice, delete-schedule

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
